name: coLssIdentRemoteSlave
title: coLssIdentRemoteSlave
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
void coLssIdentRemoteSlave( dword vendorId, dword productCode, dword revisionNoLow, dword revisionNoHigh, dword serialNoLow, dword serialNoHigh, dword errCode[] );
With this service the LSS master commands all LSS slaves whose LSS address matches the transmitted LSS address parameters to identify themselves.
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)

Example dword errCode[1];/* get values from environment variables */dword vendorId = getValue(envVendorId);dword productCode = getValue(envProductCode);dword revNoLow = getValue(envRevNoLow);dword revNoHigh = getValue(envRevNoHigh);dword serialNoLow = getValue(envSerialNoLow);dword serialNoHigh = getValue(envSerialNoHigh);coLssIdentRemoteSlave( vendorId, productCode, revNoLow, revNoHigh, serialNoLow, serialNoHigh );
